name: Senseonics Holdings, Inc.
sic_description: Industrial Instruments For Measurement, Display, and Control
summary: PART I Overview We are a medical technology company focused on the development and commercialization of a long-term, implantable continuous glucose monitoring (CGM) system to improve the lives of people with diabetes by enhancing their ability to manage their disease with relative ease and accuracy.
